stemHtml: A visual and aural warning of runaway trim requires…

options.a: NO action, as the autopilot will reset the trim once it has isolated the auto-trim system.
options.b: Immediate action to stop the runaway. The aircraft must be configured for landing, using the non-normal checklist.
options.c: The autopilot to be left engaged for the approach and landing, as manual control may require excessive manual forces.
options.d: Disconnection of the autopilot, and manual trimming fully forward, to retain control full flap must be used for landing.
